creator: ohauer@gmx.de
text:
Hi Jason,

I included the patch from PR 151078 to the diff
http://people.freebsd.org/~ohauer/diffs/PR_150576_tomcat55_p2.diff

I'm not really sure if you like to change the proxy port 8082 to the
AJP port (8009).

If the new diff does not match what you expect please send
me your conf/server.xml as tar file so I can merge it to
files/patch-conf::server.xml

--
olli
